title: Day 8 Speaking Drill — Will Have (Future Perfect)
instructions: हर sentence को ज़ोर से बोलें। Stress marks पर ध्यान दें।

sentences.english: By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.
sentences.hindi: कल तक, मैं report खत्म कर चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By to-MOR-row, I will have FIN-ished the re-PORT.

sentences.english: By next year, she will have completed her MBA.
sentences.hindi: अगले साल तक, वह MBA पूरी कर चुकी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: By NEXT year, she will have com-PLET-ed her M-B-A.

sentences.english: By 5 PM, we will have left the office.
sentences.hindi: 5 बजे तक, हम office से निकल चुके होंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: By FIVE P-M, we will have LEFT the OF-fice.

sentences.english: By Friday, I will have completed the testing phase.
sentences.hindi: Friday तक, testing phase पूरा हो चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By FRI-day, I will have com-PLET-ed the TEST-ing phase.

sentences.english: By our next meeting, we will have finalized the design.
sentences.hindi: हमारी next meeting तक, design finalize हो चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By our NEXT MEET-ing, we will have FI-nal-ized the de-SIGN.

sentences.english: By Q4, our company will have reached its revenue target.
sentences.hindi: Q4 तक, revenue target पूरा हो चुका होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By Q-FOUR, our COM-pa-ny will have REACHED its REV-e-nue TAR-get.

sentences.english: By December, I will have saved enough for my trip.
sentences.hindi: December तक, trip के लिए पैसे बचा चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: By De-CEM-ber, I will have SAVED e-NOUGH for my TRIP.

sentences.english: In five years, I will have become a senior manager.
sentences.hindi: 5 सालों में, senior manager बन चुका होऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: In FIVE years, I will have be-COME a SEEN-yor MAN-a-ger.
